digest.component_or_area: Gerrit + GitHub Actions serial auto-lander (project infra)
propositions: Parallel agent sessions racing to land on fast-forward-only main force manual rebase-and-retry, burning CI runs and agent attention.
A serial auto-lander lands the front Autosubmit change/chain by rebasing to tip, awaiting a fresh Verified, then ancestor-atomic submitting the tested SHA.
The land command returns one typed terminal outcome (merged | needs_rebase | ci_failed | review_failed) so agents never correlate Gerrit primitives themselves.
Only needs_rebase is persisted in bot state (S3); merged, ci_failed, and review_failed are derived live from Gerrit primitives.
Landing logic must stay project infrastructure and never add Gerrit-specific code to rebar core, preserving the platform-agnostic mission.
The two-vote gate and FFO backstop must never be weakened; nothing lands whose to-be-merged tree was not CI-tested (GerriScary posture).
